title: palicourea hispidula
intro: Palicourea hispidula, also known as the "canela de Monte" or "mountain cinnamon", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Palicourea hispidula include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Palicourea hispidula is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and injuries.
